headline: Anthropic ramps up its political activities with a new PAC
angle: An AI safety company that warns about existential risks is now buying political influence—the ultimate hedge bet.
scene: A corporate boardroom. A sleek, modern table with a nameplate reading 'Anthropic PAC Committee.' An executive in business casual holds up a check. On the wall behind them: a framed poster reading 'We're solving AI alignment' on one side, and on the other side, a portrait of a smiling politician with a question mark for a face.
setup: So we're warning Congress that AI could destroy humanity...
punchline: ...and also funding the candidates who'll make sure it happens on our timeline.
instagram_caption: An AI safety company launches a political PAC. Nothing says alignment like hedging your bets.
image_prompt: Single-panel cartoon, clean line art, thick black outlines, muted blue-gray pastel colors, white background, New Yorker magazine aesthetic, flat colors, no shading, no gradients, no signature. Interior of a corporate boardroom. A confident executive in business attire holds a large check, smiling. Behind them on the wall hang two framed items side by side: left frame shows a mission statement poster about AI safety and alignment, right frame shows a generic politician's portrait with a large question mark replacing their face. The table is sleek glass or polished wood with minimalist design. Afternoon light streams through floor-to-ceiling windows showing a city skyline.
